title: Day 27: Day 27 — Events & Recruiting Nights
content:
# Day 27 — Events & Recruiting Nights

## Topic
Using live experiences to make your brokerage real, memorable, and attractive

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Host recruiting events with a purpose:** Open-house-style recruiting nights, office tours, or shadow days can create low-pressure entry points.
- **Let prospects experience the culture:** A strong event shows how your people work, communicate, and support each other.
- **Structure matters:** Good events need invites, follow-up, clear agendas, and ownership so they don’t turn into random social fluff.
- **Top agents are powerful proof:** Letting prospects meet productive agents builds trust faster than polished marketing copy.
- **Use events to move people forward:** The goal is not attendance for its own sake; it’s to create next conversations and real recruiting momentum.

## Why It Matters
A live recruiting event makes your brokerage tangible. Instead of just hearing claims, prospects can feel the culture, see the standards, and picture themselves inside the business.
